productDisplayName: Baggit Women Lamboo Mayur Black Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece without a bag as well. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cm Crafted from genuine leather with a three-fold open style Buckle detail on the upper and a magnetic button closure Printed branding on the back Nine card holders, one id card holder, two pockets and a key holder on the left fold Two zippered compartments and a pocket on the centre fold A small pocket on the inner flap area A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
